summary: Completed comprehensive testing of both bug fixes: Match Status Display and Header Auth State. Both fixes are working correctly as intended.
passed_tests: Backend health check returns healthy status
Match API returns proper status data (status, statusDetail, matchMinute, utcDate)
Admin login successful with correct credentials
Homepage renders correctly with match cards showing date/time for NOT_STARTED matches
StatusBadge component structure implemented correctly for different match statuses
MatchRow meta bar hides date/time for matches with status badges
Header shows authenticated state on subscribe page (Level badge, user avatar visible)
Login/Register buttons correctly hidden when authenticated
Subscribe page renders with 3 plan cards as expected
Auth state maintained after hard refresh on subscribe page
WebSocket connection shows live updates active status
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (13/14 test scenarios passed)
